title: euphrasia collina subsp. tetragona
intro: Euphrasia collina subsp. tetragona, also known as Eyebright, is a perennial plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various eye and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Eyebright include its ability to alleviate eye strain, conjunctivitis, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia collina subsp. tetragona include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support eye health and relieve respiratory symptoms.
